# expectedFulfillmentCount

**Instance Property**

The number of times [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestExpectation/fulfill()] must be called before the expectation is completely fulfilled.

## Declaration

```swift
var expectedFulfillmentCount: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

The value of [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestExpectation/expectedFulfillmentCount] must be greater than 0. By default, expectations have an [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestExpectation/expectedFulfillmentCount] of 1.



## Fulfillment Count

- **assertForOverFulfill**: Indicates that an assertion should be triggered during testing if the expectation is over-fulfilled.
